error_signature: values returning undefined after Split In Batches
title: Values become undefined after using Split In Batches
symptom: After adding a Split In Batches node, some expressions return undefined values instead of the expected data.
not_this_if: No Split In Batches node is used
root_cause: When the number of items changes between nodes, n8n struggles to maintain the correct mapping of data items, leading to undefined values in expressions that rely on item linking.
fix_steps: Use $items('Node Name', 0, 0) for explicit access to items
Restructure the workflow to ensure consistent item counts between nodes
agent_instruction: Implement explicit item access and restructure the workflow to maintain item counts.
